roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Revoke Probation
DEF NOTICE OF ENROLLMENT TO DUI PROGRAM RECEIVED
DEFT'S MOTION MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS, DEC FILED
DEFT NOTICE OF COMPLETION TO DUI PROGRAM RECEIVED
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:ADD TO CALENDAR FOR 18 MONTH MOP REFERRAL/DAWT/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO ENROLL AND COMPLETE THE 18 MONTH MULTIPLE OFFENDERS'PROGRAM (MOP)/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:DA MTR HRG/X:HEARING NOT HAPPENING, REINSTATE PROBATION//MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:10-07-21/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED NOT TO DRIVE A VEHICLE UNLESS IT IS EQUIPPED WITH ACERTIFIED IGNITION INTERLOCK DEVICE FOR A PERIOD OF 197DAYS/CTORD:SCRAM MAY BE REMOVED UPON PROOF OF IGNITION INTERLOCK DEVICE INSTALLATION/PROB EXT:05-21-22/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE/FTRRECORDED/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING VIA GPS DEVICE IS TERMINATED, DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON SCRAM/X:FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:SUPP RPT ON APD MTR AND RULING ON DEF REQUEST TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/X:THE COURT DENIES DEFENSE REQUEST TO MODIFY CONDITIONSOF RELEASE WITHOUTPREJUDICE/CONTD:HEARING ON MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/SB:2HR/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON APD MTR/FTRRECORDED/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TOMODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION/APD-MTR/SUPP:09-23-21/S17/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CONTD:RECEIPT OF SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT AND TO SET APD MTR/SB:2 HOUR/

/CAL: APD MTR FILING/09    DTS DA MTR/WIAMTR/PROB ADM REV/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO ABIDE BY THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:/X: 1) DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT IMMEDIATELY TO APD/X: 2) APD TO OUTFIT DEFENDANT WITH SCRAM   GPS DEVICE AND MONITOR ACCORDINGLY/X: 3) MONDAY THROUGH SATURDAY, DEFENDANT SHALL ABIDE BY A CURFEW: SHALL NOT LEAVE THE HOUSE BEFORE 10AM AND BE HOME BY 8 PM/X: 4) DEFENDANT IS ON HOUSE ARREST ALL DAY ON SUNDAYS/X: 5) DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE NO ALCHOL OR DRUGS WITHOUT A VALID PERSCRIPTION/14    GPROGRESS REPORT/PROG:04-26-21/CONTD: VERIFICATION OF SCRAM ON 04-26-21/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH2:PROB  3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:2/SWAPD:12-26-18/PF460 18/MOP1/LREG/IID:1/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:THE DEFENDANT ALSO ADMITS TO A PRIOR FROM SAN MATEO ONDECEMBER 23, 2009,/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/
